programme.title: The Munsters
programme.desc: Herman believes Eddie's affection is being stolen by a children's television idol.

programme.desc: Herman pens himself into trouble when he ghostwrites love letters for a shy co-worker.

programme.title: The Munsters
programme.desc: Grandpa concocts a potion to provide instant talent for Eddie when Herman forces him to take up the trumpet.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Before marrying her fiancé Brad, Mark gives his friend a lesson about marriage that he hopes she will hold dear to her heart.

programme.desc: Sheinelle Jones discovers how some adorable creatures wake up, rise and shine each morning in their wild habitats.

programme.title: Wild Child
programme.desc: Sheinelle Jones braves Earth's sun-soaked desert environments to see the creatures that dwell among the dunes.

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom Protecting the Wild
programme.desc: Peter and Dr. Rae visit a remarkable animal rehabilitation center in the Pacific Northwest and meet with the veterinarians, animal rescuers and residents dedicated to saving amazing creatures, including orphaned bear cubs and an injured bald eagle.

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom Protecting the Wild
programme.desc: Peter and Dr. Rae travel to Cape Canaveral, Fla., to help save critically endangered sawfish; Peter joins researchers monitoring wild sawfish and tracking their migration; Peter and Dr. Rae have a close-up encounter with sawfish in the Bahamas.

programme.desc: Maxwell learns his brother once proposed to Fran; Fran finds out about Maxwell's fling with Marla Maples.

programme.title: The Nanny

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Kelly plan a get-together for Doug, Deacon and Arthur to keep them from going crazy during the strike.

programme.title: Nouvelle vague
programme.desc: Reimagining the making of Jean-Luc Godard's "Breathless" in an exploration of the youthful rebellion and creative chaos that shaped the French New Wave.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Poor Things
programme.desc: Brought back to life by an unorthodox scientist, a young woman runs off with a lawyer on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, she grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.

programme.title: Universal Language
programme.desc: Two women find frozen cash, try to retrieve it. A tour guide leads tourists around Winnipeg sites. A man quits his job and visits his mother.

programme.title: Coming Home
programme.desc: Going behind the scenes of the production of the Crave Original drama series "Little Bird," and the groundbreaking movement for Indigenous narrative sovereignty as experienced by the series' creatives, crew and Sixties Scoop advisors.

programme.title: We Grown Now

programme.title: Plus One
programme.desc: Longtime single friends agree to be each other's plus one at every wedding they are invited to.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: Murder Most Medieval
programme.desc: Jennifer finds the body of a local college history professor hidden in a suit of armor she purchased. After the professor's teaching assistant becomes the next victim, Jennifer finds herself caught in a killer's web of dangerous lies.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: When Paddington discovers his beloved aunt has gone missing from the Home for Retired Bears, he and the Brown family head to the jungles of Peru to find her. Determined to solve the mystery, they soon stumble across a legendary treasure as they make their way through the rainforests of the Amazon.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: James Bond (Timothy Dalton) takes on his most-daring adventure after he turns renegade and tracks down one of the international drug cartel's most-brutal and powerful leaders. After the murder of his just-married friend, he is fighting not only for country and justice, but for personal revenge!

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: After an epic battle, a great city lies in ruins, but the Earth itself is saved. As humanity begins to pick up the pieces, a shadowy group emerges to try to take control of history. programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Fast X
programme.desc: Over many missions and against impossible odds, Dom Toretto and his family have outsmarted and outdriven every foe in their path. Now, they must confront the most lethal opponent they've ever faced. Fueled by revenge, a terrifying threat emerges from the shadows of the past to shatter Dom's world and destroy everything -- and everyone -- he loves.

programme.title: Tár
